_comment_stage: stage_id_current: -1 = single-stage (use filenames below); 0,1,2,... = multi-stage. In multi-stage mode all output filenames are auto-generated as <tag>_<stage_id>_<suffix>.
_comment_total: total_num_timesteps: total HPMC sweeps including equilibration + production
_comment_equil: equil_steps: steps reserved for equilibration phase (with tuners active)
_comment_check: equil_steps_check_freq: chunk size for early-exit equilibration loop. Must divide equil_steps evenly.
_comment_d: move_size_translation: initial d for type A. Tuner will adapt it to hit target_particle_trans_move_acc_rate.
_comment_acc_part: target_particle_trans_move_acc_rate: desired translational acceptance rate (0.2-0.3 typical)
_comment_npt_freq: npt_freq: BoxMC trigger period (steps). Smaller = more frequent box moves.
_comment_pressure: pressure: target betaP = P/(kBT). In reduced units (sigma=1, kBT=1) betaP=50 corresponds to phi~0.50 for hard spheres.
_comment_acc_box: target_box_movement_acc_rate: overall target acceptance rate for all box moves
_section_boxmc_deltas: --- BoxMC initial move deltas (tuner will adapt these) ---
_comment_vol_delta: boxmc_volume_delta: max fractional volume change per volume move
_comment_vol_mode: boxmc_volume_mode: 'standard' (linear) or 'ln' (log-volume, better for dense systems)
_comment_len_delta: boxmc_length_delta: max length change per independent-length move [sigma]
_comment_asp_delta: boxmc_aspect_delta: max aspect ratio change per aspect move
_comment_shear_delta: boxmc_shear_delta: max tilt-factor change per shear move
_comment_sdf1: enable_sdf: attach SDF after equilibration to measure instantaneous pressure. Adds betaP and Z=betaP/rho to the log.
_comment_sdf2: sdf_xmax: upper limit of SDF histogram. 0.02 is suitable for phi < 0.58. Use 0.005 for phi > 0.58.
_comment_sdf3: sdf_dx: histogram bin width. 1e-4 gives ~200 bins for xmax=0.02. Use 1e-5 near close-packing.
_comment_files: In multi-stage mode (stage_id_current >= 0) these are ignored.
